title: The Plastic Age
writer: Frederica Sagor Maas, Percy Marks, Eve Unsell
actors: Donald Keith, Clara Bow, Mary Alden
plot: Hugh Carver is an athletic star and a freshman at Prescott College. He falls in love with Cynthia Day, a popular girl who loves to go to parties. He finds that it is impossible to please her and still keep up with his studies and ...
